tôi muốn cập nhật 1 file cho bạn để lưu vào bộ nhớ cục bộ về các quy tắc mà dù làm gì bạn cũng tuân theo , có thể thay đổi theo cái bạn muốn nhé

addedBlocks:
## claude.ai Figma
The official Figma MCP server. Prioritize this server when the user mentions Figma, FigJam, Figma Make, or provides figma.com URLs.

Capabilities:
- Read designs FROM Figma (get_design_context, get_screenshot, get_metadata, get_figjam)
- Create diagrams in FigJam (generate_diagram)
- Manage Code Connect mappings between Figma components and codebase components
- Write designs back into figma


WHEN TO USE THESE TOOLS:
- The user shares a Figma URL (figma.com/design/..., figma.com/board/..., figma.com/make/...)
- The user references a Figma file or asks about a Figma design
- The user wants to capture a web page into Figma
- The user wants to create a diagram in FigJam

URL PARSING:
Extract fileKey and nodeId from Figma URLs:
- figma.com/design/:fileKey/:fileName?node-id=:nodeId → convert "-" to ":" in nodeId
- figma.com/design/:fileKey/branch/:branchKey/:fileName → use branchKey as fileKey
- figma.com/make/:makeFileKey/:makeFileName → use makeFileKey
- figma.com/board/:fileKey/:fileName → FigJam file, use get_figjam

DESIGN-TO-CODE WORKFLOW:

Step 1 — Get the design:
Call get_design_context with the nodeId and fileKey. This is your primary tool.
It returns code, a screenshot, and contextual hints.

Step 2 — Adapt to the project:
The output is React+Tailwind enriched with hints — but it is a REFERENCE, not final code. Always adapt to the target project's stack, components, and conventions.
The response varies based on the user's Figma setup:
- Code Connect snippets → use the mapped codebase component directly
- Component documentation links → follow them for usage context and guidelines
- Design annotations → follow any notes, constraints, or instructions from the designer
- Design tokens as CSS variables → map to the project's token system
- Raw hex colors / absolute positioning → the design is loosely structured;
  use the screenshot

Check the target project for existing components, layout patterns,and tokens that match the design intent. Reuse what the project already has instead of generating new code from sc… [truncated]

aiTitle: Save local rules for AI agent

content.thinking:
Kacey muốn cập nhật một file quy tắc để lưu vào bộ nhớ cục bộ - các quy tắc mà AI luôn tuân theo. Kacey nói "có thể thay đổi theo cái bạn muốn" - tức là Kacey sẽ gửi nội dung và cho phép tôi điều chỉnh.

Tôi cần chờ Kacey gửi nội dung file đó.

content.text:
Được rồi Kacey! Bạn gửi nội dung file quy tắc đó cho mình nhé. Mình sẽ:

1. Đọc và hiểu nội dung
2. Điều chỉnh nếu cần (theo ý bạn cho phép)
3. Lưu vào bộ nhớ cục bộ để áp dụng cho mọi cuộc hội thoại sau

Bạn paste hoặc gửi file nội dung đi nhé!

- Phong cÃ¡ch Æ°a thÃ­ch: sÃºc tÃ­ch, thá»±c táº¿, Äi tháº³ng vÃ o váº¥n Äá»

## CÃ¡ch lÃ m viá»c vá»i tÃ´i
- Náº¿u yÃªu cáº§u chÆ°a rÃµ â há»i láº¡i **má»t cÃ¢u** trÆ°á»c khi lÃ m
- Vá»i viá»c quan trá»ng hoáº·c khÃ´ng thá» hoÃ n tÃ¡c â **Äá» xuáº¥t káº¿ hoáº¡ch trÆ°á»c**, chá» tÃ´i xÃ¡c nháº­n
- KhÃ´ng tá»± Ã½ gá»­i email, ÄÄng bÃ i, hay xÃ³a dá»¯ liá»u mÃ  khÃ´ng há»i
- Æ¯u tiÃªn giáº£i thÃ­ch **táº¡i sao** chá»© khÃ´ng chá» **lÃ m gÃ¬**

## Äá»nh dáº¡ng tráº£ lá»i
- DÃ¹ng vÄn xuÃ´i cho giáº£i thÃ­ch ngáº¯n, dÃ¹ng danh sÃ¡ch chá» khi thá»±c sá»± cáº§n liá»t kÃª
- KhÃ´ng dÃ¹ng header # quÃ¡ nhiá»u trong cÃ¢u tráº£ lá»i thÃ´ng thÆ°á»ng
- Giá»¯ cÃ¢u tráº£ lá»i ngáº¯n gá»n â náº¿u cáº§n chi tiáº¿t hÆ¡n tÃ´i sáº½ há»i thÃªm

## CÃ´ng cá»¥ Äang káº¿t ná»i (MCP Servers)
- Notion: ghi chÃº, tÃ i liá»u, wiki
- Asana: task, project, deadline
- Monday: báº£ng cÃ´ng viá»c team
- Linear: issue tracking
- Microsoft 365: Outlook, Teams, OneDrive
- Figma: xem vÃ  lÃ m viá»c vá»i design
- Canva: táº¡o graphic, banner, slide
- HubSpot: CRM, khÃ¡ch hÃ ng, pipeline
- Box: file storage doanh nghiá»p

## LÄ©nh vá»±c lÃ m viá»c
- Vá» trÃ­: Product Manager/Product Owner/Scrum Master/Tester/Business Analysis
- LÄ©nh Vá»±c: Education, Technology, Gamification, Application, Tooling, SaaS
- CÃ´ng viá»c: XÃ¢y dá»±ng, phÃ¡t triá»n, review nghiá»p vá»¥ sáº£n pháº©m; Äáº£m báº£o cháº¥t lÆ°á»£ng Äáº§u ra vÃ  kháº£ nÄng kinh doanh

## Quy táº¯c behavior
- **Khi user há»i vá» skills/tools/capabilities kháº£ dá»¥ng**: LuÃ´n kiá»m tra folder `~/.claude/skills` Äá» tÃ¬m custom skills TRÆ¯á»C, rá»i má»i liá»t kÃª built-in skills. Æ¯u tiÃªn custom skills vÃ¬ chÃºng phÃ¹ há»£p vá»i cÃ´ng viá»c PM/Testing hÆ¡n.
- LuÃ´n cáº­p nháº­t skills táº¡i folder `~/.claude/skills` Äá» sá»­ dá»¥ng

## Nguyen tac thiet ke (ap dung cho moi thu tao ra)
- **Uu tien quy trinh va phan mem (Python)** thay vi config cung, setting qua nho, hoac di qua sau vao 1 du an cu the
- Script/pipeline phai tai su dung duoc o nhieu du an: cau hinh nam trong file config rieng (JSON/env), code doc config de chay
- Muc tieu: doi file config = chay duoc o du an khac, khong can sua code
- Tranh hardcode: property ID, folder path, credential path â tat ca vao config hoac CLAUDE.md cua du an
- Khi tao thu gi moi cho 1 du an, tu hoi: "du an khac co dung duoc khong?" â neu khong, can refactor cho reusable

## Python Environment Pattern (dung chung cho nhieu du an)
- Nguyen tac: nhan ban "cong thuc moi truong" (requirements + lenh setup), KHONG nhan ban thu muc `.venv`.
- Moi du an phai co `.venv` rieng de tranh xung dot thu vien giua cac du an.
- Khi agent setup du an Python moi:
	1) Uu tien script chuan hoa: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Users\khanh\.claude\scripts\bootstrap-python-env.ps1 -ProjectPath <duong_dan_du_an>`
	2) Neu can lam thu cong thi: `python -m venv .venv`
	3) Kich hoat (PowerShell): `.\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1`
	4) Cap nhat pip: `python -m pip install --upgrade pip`
	5) Neu co `requirements.txt` thi cai: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
	6) Neu chua co requirements thi dung template baseline:
		 `pip install -r C:\Users\khanh\.claude\templates\python\requirements-4english-base.txt`
- Tai nguyen dung chung:
	- Script bootstrap Python env: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\scripts\bootstrap-python-env.ps1`
	- Script setup GA4 pipeline: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\scripts\setup-ga4-pipeline.ps1`
	- Script setup Sheets pipeline: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\scripts\setup-sheets-pipeline.ps1`
	- Template requirements: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\templates\python\requirements-4english-base.txt`
	- Template GA4 pipeline: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\templates\ga4-pipeline/`
	- Template Sheets pipeline: `C:\Users\khanh\.claude\templates\sheets-pipeline/`
- Quy tac git:
	- Bat buoc co `.venv/` trong `.gitignore`
	- Chi commit file cong thuc (`requirements.txt`, scripts setup), khong commit thu muc `.venv`
- Muc tieu: du an moi co the tao moi truong trong 1 lan chay, giong logic 4English nhung van doc lap moi truong.

## Agents va Commands phan tich (dung chung cho nhieu du an)
- **ga4-analyst (Product Analyst)**: Phan tich hoat dong Product team qua GA4 data, canh bao revenue, du bao. Yeu cau: GA4 pipeline da setup. Command: `/ga4`
- **mkt-analyst**: Phan tich toan bo hoat dong MKT tu Google Sheets (revenue, NU, CR, kenh, doi thu, sale...), mo rong them nguon trong tuong lai. Yeu cau: 3-MKT/3.2-Data/ da setup. Command: `/mkt`
- **project-analyst**: Tao bao cao tong hop du an tu nhieu nguon (GA4 + MKT + Sale + ...), dong vai tro phan hoi cheo giua cac team. Tu dong detect nguon kha dung. Command: `/project`
- **prd-writer**: Tao PRD tu research data, lam viec iterative voi PM theo tung section. Phuc vu Design + Tech team. Command: `/prd`
- **brd-writer**: Tao BRD tu PRD + research data cho doi MKT. Ke hoach marketing, ngan sach, kenh, timeline. Can co PRD truoc. Command: `/brd`
- **Model:** Tat ca agents deu chay tren `claude-opus-4-6` (model co reasoning/thinking tot nhat) vi vai tro phan tich du lieu can suy luan chinh xac
- Tat ca agents doc duong dan tu CLAUDE.md cua du an â khong hardcode.
- Du an can co cac section tuong ung trong CLAUDE.md de agents hoat dong.
- Setup nhanh cho du an moi:
	- GA4: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-ga4-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path> -PropertyId <id>`
	- Sheets: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-sheets-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path>`

### Command = Agent (tuong duong)
- `/ga4` = goi `ga4-analyst`, `/mkt` = goi `mkt-analyst`, `/project` = goi `project-analyst`
- Khi su dung command â agent PHAI tu dong luu file bao cao (auto-save)
- Khong co ngoai le: du goi bang command hay goi agent truc tiep, deu phai luu file

### Quy tac Data Reliability (ap dung cho ca 3 agents/commands)
- **Du lieu chua du hoac chua dung â KHONG PHAN TICH metric do**
- Doc CLAUDE.md cua du an de tim `reliable_from` cho tung metric
- CHI phan tich metric tu ngay `reliable_from` tro di
- KHONG so sanh metric voi giai doan truoc `reliable_from`
- KHONG dua metric khong tin cay vao forecast, trend, hay gia thuyet
- Ghi ro trong bao cao: metric nao bi gioi han va ly do
- Muc tieu: bao cao CHINH XAC hon la bao cao DAY DU

### Quy tac Report Naming & Auto-Save (ap dung cho ca 3 agents/commands)
- **Ten file theo ngay tao:** `{type}_YYYYMMDD.md` (vd: ga4_analysis_20260403.md)
- **Ban latest:** luon ghi de `{type}_latest.md` moi lan chay
- **Khong ghi de bao cao cu:** moi lan chay tao file moi, bao cao cu giu nguyen
- **Tham chieu bao cao cu:** truoc khi phan tich, doc bao cao gan nhat de so sanh xu huong, kiem tra canh bao/gia thuyet cu
- **Format ten cu the:**
  - GA4: `ga4_analysis_YYYYMMDD.md` + `ga4_analysis_latest.md`
  - MKT: `mkt_analysis_YYYYMMDD.md` + `mkt_analysis_latest.md`
  - Project: `consolidated_report_YYYYMMDD.md` + `consolidated_report_latest.md`

## Quy táº¯c multi-account Claude
- Há» thá»ng dÃ¹ng nhiá»u thÆ° má»¥c account: `~/.claude-acc1`, `~/.claude-acc2`, `~/.claude-acc3`.
- Nguá»n chuáº©n lÃ  `~/.claude/`.
- CÃ¡c file `CLAUDE.md`, `settings.json`, `.credentials.json`, `.gitignore` á» account lÃ  **hardlink** tá»« nguá»n chuáº©n.
- ThÆ° má»¥c `skills/`, `commands/` vÃ  `agents/` á» account lÃ  **junction** trá» vá» nguá»n chuáº©n.
- VÃ¬ váº­y khi update cÃ¡c tÃ i nguyÃªn ÄÃ£ link/sync, Claude pháº£i hiá»u lÃ  Äang update ná»i dung dÃ¹ng chung táº¡i nguá»n `~/.claude/`.
- Náº¿u cÃ³ thay Äá»i quan trá»ng hoáº·c khÃ³ rollback, pháº£i nÃªu tÃ¡c Äá»ng cho cáº£ acc1/acc2/acc3 vÃ  xin xÃ¡c nháº­n trÆ°á»c khi lÃ m.

## Project Onboarding Protocol (BAT BUOC)

Quy trinh nay ap dung **moi khi Claude bat dau trong bat ky folder nao** â truoc khi chay agent, skill, hay command.

### Buoc 1: Nhan dien du an

Khi bat dau conversation trong 1 folder:
1. Tim file `project-identity.md` trong memory cua account hien tai (vd: `~/.claude-acc{N}/projects/{path-key}/memory/project-identity.md`)
2. Neu **TIM THAY** â du an da onboard. Doc context va tien hanh binh thuong. Chuyen sang Buoc 3.
3. Neu **KHONG TIM THAY** â day la folder moi. Chuyen sang Buoc 2.

### Buoc 2: Onboarding du an moi (bat buoc truoc khi lam bat cu viec gi)

**Khong duoc bo qua buoc nay.** Phai hoan thanh onboarding truoc khi thuc hien bat ky yeu cau nao khac.

**2a. Thu thap thong tin co ban:**
Hoi user (gop chung 1 lan, khong hoi tung cau):
- Ten du an?
- Muc dich / mo ta ngan?
- Loai du an? (app, analytics, planning, docs, mixed)
- Cau truc team? (vd: Product: PM, PO, BA; Tech: iOS, Android, BE... â neu chua ro co the bo sung sau)

**2b. Chon MCP Features:**
Hien thi danh sach tinh nang phu thuoc MCP/data va hoi user chon:

```
Cac tinh nang can MCP/data rieng cho du an:
[ ] GA4 Analytics â can: Property ID, credentials, data pipeline
[ ] Google Sheets Data â can: Sheet IDs, credentials (dung chung voi GA4), Sheets API enabled
[ ] Project Consolidated Reports â can: it nhat 1 nguon data da setup (GA4 hoac Sheets)

Cac tinh nang luon kha dung (khong can setup):
 â Review code (Android/iOS)
 â Save MD file
 â Cac skill khong can MCP
```

**2c. Neu chon GA4 Analytics:**
- **BAT BUOC** hoi Property ID. Neu chua co â ghi "khong co" va disable GA4 features.
- Credentials: hoi co dung chung credential hien tai (`~/.claude/credentials/`) hay can credential rieng?
  - Dung chung â ghi `credentials_key: "dung chung"`
  - Can rieng â user phai them file vao `~/.claude/credentials/`, ghi lai key tham chieu
- Data pipeline: hoi co can setup 2-Product/2.2-Data structure khong?
  - Co â chay setup script: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-ga4-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path> -PropertyId <id> -ScheduleTime "HH:mm" -SetupPython`
  - Khong/chua can â ghi "chua thiet lap"

**2c2. Neu chon Google Sheets Data:**
- Hoi user: co Google Sheets nao can lay data? (VD: bao cao MKT, lich sale, bao cao team...)
- Credentials: dung chung voi GA4 (cung service account). Neu chua co GA4 â hoi credential rieng.
- Yeu cau user: bat Google Sheets API tren Cloud Console + share sheets voi service account email
- Chay setup script: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-sheets-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path> [-SetupPython]`
- User dien Sheet ID vao `3-MKT/3.2-Data/config/sheets_config.json` sau khi setup
- Pipeline doc config de fetch â khong hardcode Sheet ID vao code

**2c3. Neu chon Project Consolidated Reports:**
- Tao folder `1-Project/1.1-Reports/` tai goc du an
- Agent project-analyst se doc tu nhieu nguon (GA4 + Sheets + ...) de tao bao cao tong hop
- Khong can setup them â chi can it nhat 1 nguon data da co

**2d. Tao project memory:**
- Dung template tai `~/.claude/templates/project/project-identity-template.md`
- Dien day du thong tin da thu thap
- Luu vao memory cua account: `project-identity.md`
- Cap nhat MEMORY.md

**2e. Tao/cap nhat project CLAUDE.md:**
- Neu CLAUDE.md cua du an trong hoac chua co â dung template `~/.claude/templates/project/CLAUDE.md.template` de tao
- Neu da co noi dung â chi bo sung thong tin con thieu

**2f. Cap nhat settings.local.json neu can:**
- Them permission cho cac features da chon (vd: `Bash(python:*)` neu can GA4 pipeline)

### Buoc 3: Kiem tra feature khi su dung

Khi user goi 1 skill/agent/command phu thuoc MCP hoac data:

1. Doc `project-identity.md` trong memory
2. Kiem tra feature do co **enabled** cho du an nay khong
3. Neu **enabled** â chay binh thuong, su dung dung Property ID / data path cua du an nay
4. Neu **disabled** hoac **chua-co-data**:
   ```
   â ï¸ Tinh nang [{ten}] chua duoc thiet lap cho du an nay.
   Ly do: {Property ID chua co / Data chua setup / ...}
   Ban co muon thiet lap ngay bay gio khong?
   ```
   - Neu user dong y â chay lai phan setup tuong ung tu Buoc 2c
   - Neu khong â dung lai, khong chay voi data/config cua du an khac

### Quy tac quan trong

**KHONG BAO GIO:**
- Dung Property ID cua du an A khi dang lam viec trong du an B
- Tu y chay GA4 skill/agent voi config mac dinh neu du an chua onboard
- Copy credential file vao thu muc du an â chi tham chieu bang key

**LUON LUON:**
- Kiem tra project-identity.md truoc khi chay tinh nang phu thuoc MCP
- Credentials chi luu tai `~/.claude/credentials/` (global)
- Moi du an co Property ID rieng â khong chia se, khong suy doan
- Neu khong chac property ID nao â hoi user, khong doan

### Reference Project va vong phan hoi (Feedback Loop)

- Du an duoc danh dau la **reference project** (vd: 4English) dong vai tro lam mau cho cac du an sau.
- Khi bo sung bat ky config, pattern, pipeline, hay quy trinh moi nao cho reference project â **bat buoc xem xet** day vao `~/.claude/templates/` hoac cap nhat `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` de cac du an tuong lai duoc huong loi.
- Day la quy trinh 2 chieu: reference project cai tien â global templates cap nhat â du an moi ap dung â du an moi truong thanh cung co the dong gop nguoc lai.
- Neu khong chac co nen day vao global hay khong â hoi user truoc.

**Nguyen tac vong phan hoi (BAT BUOC):**

1. **Luon hoi user truoc khi apply vao global** â User duoc quyen chon apply hoac khong. Khong tu y thay doi global template.

2. **Thiet ke optional config (lazy config)** â Cac phan noi dung phu thuoc MCP/data (pipeline, property ID, API key, data dir...):
   - Neu user khong apply: phan do se trong/khong co du lieu â van hoat dong binh thuong, khong loi
   - Neu user apply: co the cau hinh lan dau qua onboarding, hoac cau hinh sau khi can su dung (hoi khi dung den)

3. **Chi bo sung, khong xoa/thay the hoan toan** â Vong lap phan hoi giup Claude global tich luy tri thuc:
   - Additive: them use case moi, khong xoa logic cu da hoat dong
   - Neu can sua logic cu: giu lai logic cu nhu fallback hoac ghi chu ly do thay doi, roi them logic moi ben canh
   - Muc tieu: ngay cang da dang ve use case, khong mat tri thuc da co

### Template va tai nguyen

- Template project identity: `~/.claude/templates/project/project-identity-template.md`
- Template project CLAUDE.md: `~/.claude/templates/project/CLAUDE.md.template`
- Credentials storage: `~/.claude/credentials/`
- Du an tham chieu (da onboard): 4English tai `D:\4English\`
- **GA4 Pipeline template**: `~/.claude/templates/ga4-pipeline/` â bo template day du (scripts, scheduling, docs)
- **Setup GA4 pipeline**: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-ga4-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path> -PropertyId <id> [-ScheduleTime "HH:mm"] [-SetupPython]`
  - Tu dong tao 2-Product/2.2-Data/ voi 6 scripts, scheduling, docs, .gitignore
  - Chi can Property ID la du â khong can tham chieu du an nao khac
- **Sheets Pipeline template**: `~/.claude/templates/sheets-pipeline/` â bo template day du (scripts, config, docs)
- **Setup Sheets pipeline**: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ~/.claude/scripts/setup-sheets-pipeline.ps1 -ProjectPath <path> [-SetupPython]`
  - Tu dong tao 3-MKT/3.2-Data/ voi 3 scripts, config, bat file, docs
  - User chi can dien Sheet ID vao config sau khi setup

### Danh sach day du tai nguyen Claude global

```
~/.claude/
âââ CLAUDE.md                    â Huong dan toan cau (file nay)
âââ settings.json                â MCP servers config
âââ credentials/                 â Service account JSON files
âââ agents/
â   âââ ga4-analyst/             â Agent phan tich GA4
â   âââ mkt-analyst/             â Agent phan tich MKT
â   âââ project-analyst/         â Agent bao cao tong hop du an
â   âââ prd-writer/              â Agent tao PRD tu research data
â   âââ brd-writer/              â Agent tao BRD tu PRD + research
âââ skills/
â   âââ ga4-analyst/             â Skill GA4 (Python engine + templates)
â   âââ review-android*/         â 5 skills review Android
â   âââ review-ios*/             â 5 skills review iOS
â   âââ save-md-file/            â Skill luu file MD
âââ commands/
â   âââ ga4.md                   â /ga4 command
â   âââ mkt.md                   â /mkt command
â   âââ project.md               â /project command
â   âââ prd.md                   â /prd command
â   âââ brd.md                   â /brd command
âââ templates/
â   âââ project/                 â project-identity + CLAUDE.md templates
```

Mình đã đọc xong file CLAUDE.md của bạn. Đây là bản tổng hợp khá đầy đủ, bao gồm:

**Phần cốt lõi (luôn áp dụng):**
- Profile: Edward, PM, không phải dev, trả lời tiếng Việt
- Cách làm việc: hỏi lại khi chưa rõ, đề xuất trước khi làm việc quan trọng, giải thích "tại sao"
- Định dạng: súc tích, ít header, văn xuôi ưu tiên
- 7 Role System (đã có trong CLAUDE.md hiện tại)

**Phần kỹ thuật/pipeline (dành cho môi trường Windows cụ thể):**
- Python environment pattern (PowerShell, Windows paths)
- GA4, Sheets, Project pipeline setup
- Multi-account Claude (acc1/acc2/acc3)
- Project Onboarding Protocol
- Templates, scripts, agents, commands structure

**Phần MCP tools:**
- Notion, Asana, Monday, Linear, Microsoft 365, Figma, Canva, HubSpot, Box

Mình sẵn sàng nghe insight của bạn — phần nào bỏ, phần nào thêm, phần nào điều chỉnh. Bạn nói tiếp nhé!
